title: Satires X: The Vanity of Human Wishes
description: What should we pray for? Not wealth, power, beauty, or long life — all lead to ruin. Pray only for a sound mind in a sound body.
introduction: What should we pray for? Not wealth, power, beauty, or long life — all lead to ruin. Pray only for a sound mind in a sound body.

translation.text: You should pray for a sound mind in a sound body. Ask for a brave soul that does not fear death.
